## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** The walk-forward test assumes an account size of $25,000 or more, which is required to fit the per-trade risk cap.
2. **Sample bias:** The sample used for the walk-forward test may be biased due to the selection method and the specific time period chosen.
3. **Out-of-sample test result:** The out-of-sample test result is pending and will be conducted to verify the performance of the V14E enhanced grinder output.
4. **Real-fills check on top 3 J days:** The real-fills check on the top 3 J days is pending and will be conducted to verify the performance of the V14E enhanced grinder output.
5. **Failure-mode enumeration:** The failure modes of the V14E enhanced grinder output include the possibility of overfitting to the training data and failing to generalize to new data.
6. **Concentration disclosure:** The concentration of the V14E enhanced grinder output is pending and will be disclosed once the out-of-sample test result is available.

## Pre-merge gate

The pre-merge gate for this candidate includes the completion of the out-of-sample test and the real-fills check on the top 3 J days.

8 / 10 -- The confidence in this candidate is high due to the promising results of the V14E enhanced grinder output, but the out-of-sample test result and real-fills check are still pending.
